channel.title: Eudaimonia Feed
channel.description: RSS entries filtered for lasting importance, personal growth, and eudaimonia. Updated 4x daily.

item.title: U.S. and Iran truce tested over the Strait of Hormuz, threatening to reignite conflict
item.description:
The tenuous truce between the U.S. and Iran was tested Monday, as American ships clearing a lane in the Strait of Hormuz came under fire and sank Iranian boats. Iran also fired drones and missiles at a key oil terminal in the United Arab Emirates, spooking markets and raising concerns that war could resume. Nick Schifrin reports.
[Eudaimonia Filter — Lasting: 10/10 | Growth: 6/10 | Eudaimonia: 2/10 — Lasting importance is maximum because this confrontation between the US and Iran threatens to ignite a major war with enduring global impact on oil, security, and geopolitics.]
